text.title: Google Display Network Strategy Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree on observable signals. Every leaf points to a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Is this an awareness / upper-funnel campaign with budget ≥ $1k/mo?

conclusion.verdict: layer in_market + affinity + custom_intent (no remarketing yet)

text.example: awareness, $2k/mo, remarketing 4500 source → in_market + affinity + remarketing.
